characters.name: Aiaiaia
characters.description: AiaiaiaiNameAiaiaiaiHair ColorBlackGenderFemaleEye ColorBlue Aiaiaiaiappears in episode one of Moonbeam City. She is a singer who performs at malls andDazzle Novakis her manager. At the end ofMall Hath No Fury,Rad Cunninghamsets up a rivalry between her and another singer namedUakpasia9;ahe's found to take her place. The two girls end up being deported because the nomination committee for the Golden Dream catcher award, which Dazzle invited to Aiaiaiai's show, turn out to be undercover immigration and customs agents. characters.name: Blade H. Tate
characters.description: Blade H. TateNameBlade H. TateRankNaval CommanderHair ColororangeGendermaleEye Colorgreen Commander Blade H. TateisChrysalis Tate's father . Most of the time he is pushing her around because she's to cautious of things. He is a generally loud and strong man and doesn't really hold back anything. He helped Chrysalis in episode 4,Quest for Aquaticasave Spalsha,Dazzle's dolphin girlfriend (who actually turns out to be a boy).

characters.name: Chrysalis Tate
characters.description: Chrysalis TateNameChrysalis TateRankDetectiveHair ColorOrangeGenderFemaleEye ColorGreen  Chrysalis Tate, voiced byKate Mara, is a former lab technician and Dazzle's partner. She is often skittish aroundPizzaz Millerbecause of her unfriendly vibe but stands up toDazzle NovakandRad Cunninghamwhen they are bothering her. Chrysalis usually takes the rap for Dazzle because he never does his work. She is one of few members of the Moonbeam City PD that actually demonstrates good work ethics and takes her job seriously.

characters.name: Commodore Vector Azimuth Miller
characters.description: Commodore Vector Azimuth MillerNameCommodore Vector Azimuth MillerRankCEO of Moonbeam City's laser mining businessHair ColorgreyGendermaleEye Colorgrey Commodore Vector Azimuth Millerwho appeared in episode 6,Lasers and Liarsis the father ofPizzaz Millerand her four other sistersPanache Miller,Accoutrement Miller,Charisma Miller, andSophistica Miller. His body was originally to be frozen in a block of ice but was accidentally knocked down and shattered.

characters.name: Mayor Eo Jaxxon
characters.description: Mayor Eo JaxxonNameMayor Eo JaxxonRankMayor of Moonbeam CityHair ColorGreyGenderMaleEye ColorGrey Eo Jaxxon, voiced byPowers Boothe, is the current mayor of Moonbeam City, having taken over for the former office-holder, Mayor Pendragon. A power-hungry, immoral, and unethical monster, Jaxxon is also disturbingly attracted toPizzaz Miller. To that end, he uses the threat of shutting down the Police Department, and moving the employees into the far more competent and successful Fire Department, in order to sexually extort Pizzaz into having sex with him multiple times a week. Jaxxon has at least one son, who becomes addicted to Glitzotrene during the fifth episode, but it is unknown if he has other family members.

characters.name: Dazzle Novak
characters.description: Dazzle NovakNameDazzle NovakRankDetectiveHair ColorBlackGenderMaleEye ColorBlue  Dazzle Novak, voiced byRob Lowe, is the protagonist ofMoonbeam City. Dazzle works forMoonbeam City Police Departmentas a detective and constantly demonstrates poor impulse control, a ridiculous ego, and an inability to focus on actual police work given to him by his bossPizzaz Miller. Dazzle's rivalRad Cunningham, an officer who always tries to outdo him but miserably fails however, Dazzle only succeeds in his schemes with the help of Moonbeam City's other detectiveChrysalis Tate.

characters.name: Pizzaz Miller
characters.description: Pizzaz MillerNamePizzaz MillerRankChief of policeHair ColorBlackGenderFemaleEye ColorPurple  Pizzaz Miller, voiced byElizabeth Banks, is the Moonbeam City Police Chief. Pizzaz runs the police department with an iron fist, and easily angered by her employees. Her father is the founder of Moonbeam City and is heiress to his fortune from the laser mining industry. Whenever angered, there is shadowing of venetian blinds in front of her face no matter where she is.
